description: The ReferenceCast component can be used to try to take a type and change it to another type. This performs a C# cast which requires the types to be compatible for casting to make a result.

fields.Target: The target field. Casts ``Source`` to this fields type, and then uses the result to drive this field.
fields.WriteBack: whether to allow changes to the ``Target`` to update ``Source`` instead of discarding the change. See write backs.

usage: This is a way of changing a type without using ProtoFlux. Attaching this component can be difficult, so you should be familiar with Complex Types in Components. Keep in mind this does a C# Cast, which does not work with many different conversions.
